titleStmt.title: SII 24.103: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 103. (A.R. No. 111 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Begins with the praśasti Pugaḻ mādu. Records an assignment of land by sale by the temple executives to Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ Kaḷappāḷaṉ Aḻagiya •• Mūvēndavēḷār of Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam for payment of specified quantity of paddy to the temple. Refers to the garden land of Poṉpaṟṟi Uḍaiyāṉ alias Rājēndrachōḻa Adigaimāṉār. The record is dated in the 45th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Enai riyaluṟṟuḻitarattikkaṉaittu n=tañ cakkaranaṭātti tiṟaikoḷ virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulot tuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattaiñcāvatu pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅka Āḻvār kanmikaḷil śrīvaiyiṣṇavavāriyam ya ṭuvara
vakai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattucciṟu tirunilakaṇṭan kaḷ(ā)ppāḷan Aḻakiya tirunantavanappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu kaḷākkuṭiyi ppon paṟṟiyuṭaiyārāna Irājentraccoḻa Atikai mānār tirunantavanappuṟamākat tiru vanappuṟamākap piranīr nilam yiraṇṭum Āṟu mā Āṟuṭaintu maṇal yiraṇṭum 4 10 5 Āvatu tiruttuvār
mukkoṇṭa villiviḷākattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kāṅka viḷākattukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṅkellai ṭṭa nilam mukkālum Ivvaḻakiya muventaveḷān ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavānam tiruttak kaṭavarāka śrī paṇṭāratte mukkāṟ kācu Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Ivar ceyvikka viḷākamākattiruttik koḷvārkaḷākavum Innilam mukkālukkum veli On ṟukkup paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ marakkālāl Eṇkalam nella
vicaiyapiriyanenneḻuttu ppiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīka neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamitineḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan kecavan taniyiḷañ ciṅkattin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan tiruveṅkaṭavan ciṅkattin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyen kiruṣṇaṇ kecavanneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan ciriḷaṅko Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai AlaṅStops here.
Digital edition of SII 24.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
